examples: He plugged his razor in to recharge it.
Van Gogh cut off his left ear with a razor blade in 1888.
Their electric razor gets hot and now the whole house smells like singed hair.
Their teal, barn-like tasting room is surrounded by steep hills and razor-edged desert plants.
Razor clams, soft shell clams, hooked mussels, and blue crabs piggybacked of these reefs.
